author: System Migration
context: Documenting architecture split for heavy tasks and summary of routing/mixing logic.
observation: Heavy logic in the controller stalls FL. Controller must stay thin, returning raw data. Server must do orchestration.
result: Server-side orchestration prevents stalls and removes need for flaky controller reloads.
tested_values: Routing logic and mixing intents verified through Python tests.
known_pitfalls: SysEx payloads > 1.5KB are dropped. Controller reload via FL is flaky (requires full restart).
next_recommended_action: Keep all heavy orchestration in the Python server. Paginate large SysEx responses.
